name: zopt_lookup_named_value_as_int
description: zOpt::LookupNamedValueAsInt searches the named scalar token table and returns the matching integer value or 0 when no token matches.
known_limits: Binary Ninja keeps a limited reconstruction marker because the compiler inlined strcmp sequence uses an sbb flag pattern that the current LLIL lifter does not fully model. The smoke verifies table hits including the last entry, zero-valued hits, missing names, and case-sensitive mismatch behavior.
Binary-safe verification is accepted by the zopt_lookup_named_value_as_int VC target.
